## What this changes

Briefly, what and why.

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo build --release` succeeds (core)
- [ ] If it touches capture/overlay drawing, verified with `eqs --render-test` or a real capture
- [ ] No screenshots or image files are committed (they're gitignored — keep it that way)
- [ ] Kept it small and boring — see [`STRUCTURE.md`](../STRUCTURE.md) for the architecture and invariants

## Notes for the reviewer

Anything worth calling out (Win32 quirks, edge cases, follow-ups).
